opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face is burning, completely covered in greasy yellow flakes, and the itching is driving me mad.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A burning, flaky facial rash flared up and I'm worried it's something serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: chronic/relapsing, flared over 48h with work stress and cold dry weather
symptom_narrative.character: red patches with greasy yellow scale, dandruff, itch/burning
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: sides of my nose, eyebrows and hairline/scalp (both sides, symmetrical)
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: scalp dandruff; symmetrical; NO fever, no joint pain, no rash across the cheeks/nose bridge sparing the nasolabial folds, no new cosmetics

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; work stress; dry heated home

objective_data_offered.value: symmetrical red patches with greasy yellow scale on the nasolabial folds, eyebrows and hairline plus scalp dandruff, visible on video
no fever, no spreading hot redness, no joint pain
